scenes.text:
Chase meaning and money follows.
Chase money and meaning escapes.

The happiest billionaires are not the ones with the biggest yachts. They are the ones solving the biggest problems. When your work has meaning, you never
work a day in your life. When your work is just for money, every day feels like prison. Purpose-driven people outperform profit-driven people every single time.

Find work that matters to you. Not work that pays well but leaves you empty.
Money without meaning is a golden cage. You can buy everything but feel nothing.

Rich is not a number. It is a
feeling. And that feeling comes from purpose.

Does your work give you meaning? Real
answers only. Follow for purposeful wealth.
